name: InfoVision Optoelectronics (Kunshan) Co., Ltd.
summary: InfoVision Optoelectronics (Kunshan) Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells LCD display panels. Its products include mobile panels, desktop and laptop panels, tablet and industrial personal computer panels, notebook panels, vehicle displays, and automotive displays. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Kunshan, China. InfoVision Optoelectronics (Kunshan) Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Kunshan Guochuang Investment Group Co., Ltd.
